title: Pre getting back into shape flexing 5-3-2013 - 189 lbs 85 Kg

transcript.text: All right, so this is my pre getting back into shape flexing video. I'm 189 pounds, so I have lost a pound, so this isn't like rock bottom. This is pretty much. So yeah, here we are. I think these are about 14s. You want to measure me real quick? I have it with myself.

All right. Yeah, dude, sitting pretty at about 14 and a quarter cold. I was at about 15 and a half when I was lifting. I might want to try to get up there. So did you film? Anyways, that's what I say. If you didn't film it, then trust me. So anyways, here's my arms. Here's my abs. My abs aren't so bad for not getting any exercise. I have a whole lot of fat. I have more fat than it looks like I have, I think.

I have, like, if I were to lose all this fat, it would probably be like 170 pounds. Here's my legs. Let's see how big my legs are. Try to film where it says, though. I like to have proof of everything.

And my legs right here are about 20, 20 and a quarter. My calves are 15 and a half. Okay, so what else? Lay on my pecs. Now I have droopy titty here, just because I have a huge ass lipoma under there that you're going to cut out.
And then, but I want to lose enough fat so that when I flex, you don't see the blubber. Here, zoom in on this.
You don't see the blubber? Like, I want the pecs to just cut down. That's sexy, man. So that's like when you're fit, when you don't have any blubber here.
You know, you don't have any, like, droopy titty or anything. So, yeah, that's that.
